form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently came from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track on April 1 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Ultimate Power with 60kg at $3.30. The run before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Sanliurfa on March 25 over 1300m, 0.1 len behind Dreamfyre with 58kg at $2.50. Winning hope.
